description: Expected Finance scoring signals and Build score bands for resume snippets. Used by finance_scoring_regression.py. Aligned to FINANCE_SCORING_SPEC.md and tracks.audit_finance.

entries.name: Finance major with keywords and quant impact
entries.text:
Finance, University of Tampa. Excel, Tableau, financial modeling. Analyst Intern at a regional bank. Jan 2024 - May 2024.
- Built a DCF model for due diligence; supported a $2M transaction.
- Increased report accuracy by 15%; reduced budget variance by 10%.

entries.name: Accounting with audit and leadership
entries.text:
Accounting. Beta Alpha Psi - President. Audit internship at a Big Four firm. Jun 2024 - Aug 2024.
- Assisted with GAAP compliance and SEC filings.
- Led a team of 3 on a tax advisory project.

entries.name: Economics with few finance signals
entries.text: Economics. Research assistant. No finance internships or modeling.
